errors.message: The activity identifier should begin with your IATI organisation identifier (either the current IATI Organisation identifier for the reporting organisation or a previous version included in other-identifier element) followed by a unique string for the activity separated by a hyphen

context.text: For prefix: /iati-activities/iati-activity/reporting-org/@ref = 'BE-BCE_KBO-0413119733' at line: 6, column: 34 and /iati-activities/iati-activity/iati-identifier = 'NP-IRD-qareg1-22' at line: 5, column: 5

ruleInfo.message: The activity identifier should begin with your IATI organisation identifier (either the current IATI Organisation identifier for the reporting organisation or a previous version included in other-identifier element) followed by a unique string for the activity separated by a hyphen

errors.title:
PROG2017-2021_SDI6-CMR_Les jeunes du milieu rural ou périurbain camerounais, garçons et les filles,
        reçoivent dans les CEFFAs (EFA+ et IFERs) une formation intégrale de qualité qui les prépare à s’intégrer dans
        la vie socioprofessionnelle et à contribuer à un développement local durable.

errors.message: The linked activity ID in participating-org/@activity-id should exist in the file being validated or in the IATI Datastore.
